use_cases: Form submission triggers for user actions like login, signup, or checkout
Call-to-action buttons in marketing pages and dashboards
Navigation actions within multi-step flows or wizards
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars and action bars
Destructive action confirmation buttons with visual warning states
ai_summary: A versatile button component from the ruixen.ui library built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with proper focus states, disabled states, and shadow effects. Designed for reusable UI patterns across SaaS, e-commerce, and dev tool interfaces.
